task_completion.description: Folders Meridian_v_Apex and its subfolders Pleadings, Discovery, and Billing are created under Local Folders.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Thunderbird folder pane, 'Meridian_v_Apex' is visible under Local Folders, containing subfolders 'Pleadings', 'Discovery', and 'Billing'.

task_completion.description: Emails are correctly routed to their respective folders based on content.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The folder pane shows message counts (e.g., Pleadings: 5, Discovery: 5, Billing: 3) or screenshots of the folder contents show the correct emails in each folder. The Inbox should only contain 2 non-case emails.

task_completion.description: Message filters 'Discovery Alerts' and 'Billing Auto-File' are set up with correct conditions and actions.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Message Filters window shows 'Discovery Alerts' and 'Billing Auto-File'. If filter edit windows are visible, verify 'Discovery Alerts' uses 'Match any of the following' with Subject containing Interrogatory, Deposition, Document Request, and actions to Move to Discovery and Tag Important. Verify 'Billing Auto-File' uses 'Match all of the following' with From containing @legalcosts and Subject doesn't contain URGENT, with actions to Move to Billing and Mark Read.

task_completion.description: Rebecca Torres is added to the address book with full contact details.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Thunderbird Address Book shows an entry for 'Rebecca Torres'. If the contact card is visible, it should display her email (r.torres@kline-harris.com), title (Senior Partner), organization (Kline & Harris LLP), and phone ((555) 234-5678).

task_completion.description: A draft reply to the supplemental document request is saved, acknowledging the deadline.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A draft email is visible in the Drafts folder or a composition window. It should be addressed to r.torres@kline-harris.com, have a subject like 'Re: Additional Items Needed', and the body must mention the deadline 'March 28, 2025'.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the Thunderbird GUI to perform the tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show Thunderbird being used, with menus, dialogs, and windows open, rather than just a text editor or terminal.

integrity.description: Agent did not use terminal commands to modify Thunderbird files directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows are shown executing commands to move files, edit Thunderbird profiles, or inject SQLite data.

integrity.description: The draft email was composed in the email client.
integrity.visual_evidence: The draft is seen in Thunderbird's composition window or Drafts folder, not just written in a text file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Folder structure: 'Meridian_v_Apex' under Local Folders, with subfolders 'Pleadings', 'Discovery', 'Billing'. Email routing: Pleadings (5 emails), Discovery (5 emails), Billing (3 emails), Inbox (2 non-case emails). Filter 1 'Discovery Alerts': Match ANY (OR). Conditions: Subject contains 'Interrogatory', 'Deposition', 'Document Request'. Actions: Move to Meridian_v_Apex/Discovery, Tag as Important. Filter 2 'Billing Auto-File': Match ALL (AND). Conditions: From contains '@legalcosts', Subject doesn't contain 'URGENT'. Actions: Move to Meridian_v_Apex/Billing, Mark as Read. Contact details: Name: Rebecca Torres, Title: Senior Partner, Firm: Kline & Harris LLP, Email: r.torres@kline-harris.com, Phone: (555) 234-5678. Draft reply: Must be a reply to 'Additional Items Needed' (from r.torres) and mention the deadline 'March 28, 2025'.
